name: feature.strategy.nodes
description: Strategy feature node pack (ADR 0080 / ADR 0079 / ADR 0014) — read nodes over the ctx.features.strategy surface (list, get, context, health) + a create-board-memo write node that persists an agent-authored board memo as a Document (ctx.features.documents). Lets a workflow — or the Strategy Analyst agent — read the portfolio + its health and draft a board-ready memo. The strategy surface stays READ-ONLY: the memo write lands in Documents, never in Strategy.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Strategy: List Strategies
nodes.description: Lists the workspace's shared strategies (compact refs) over ctx.features.strategy. Tenant-guarded; user-scoped private drafts excluded.

nodes.label: Strategy: Get Strategy
nodes.description: Gets one shared strategy by id (objectives, key results, initiatives, links) over ctx.features.strategy. Returns null for a missing or user-scoped strategy.

nodes.label: Strategy: Get Context
nodes.description: Resolves the compact strategy context packet for a consumer ref (projectId | priorityListId[+cardId] | boardId) over ctx.features.strategy. RBAC-bounded; private projects omitted.

nodes.label: Strategy: Get Health
nodes.description: Returns a per-strategy health rollup (on-track/at-risk/off-track) with the component signals over ctx.features.strategy, so an agent can reason about alignment gaps without inventing precision.

nodes.label: Strategy: Create Board Memo
nodes.description: Persists an agent-authored board memo (markdown) as a Document of kind board-update via ctx.features.documents. Degrades to returning the markdown inline when the documents feature is OFF. The strategy surface is never written.
